name_cn:
【SLENDER Slim Wallet】M60895 11708 Black/Floral (Vintage)
This Slender wallet is made from Brushed Monogram calfskin, featuring a vintage texture for a refined look. It includes card slots and a bill compartment, easily fitting into most pockets.
Size: 11x8.5x2 cm
